name: transfer_ibft_raw
description: Raw IBFT (Interbank Fund Transfer) event logs ingested from core banking gateway. One row per raw event, includes all status transitions, retries, raw payload fields, and intermediate states.
best_for: deep-dive debugging failed or stuck transfers, raw payload inspection, full event history including retries and intermediate status codes, discovering new fields and metrics not yet modeled in warehouse, root cause analysis, data engineering investigation

name: fct_transfer_ibft
description: Curated fact table of completed IBFT transfers. Deduplicated, conformed dimensions, one row per successful transfer. ETL runs daily. Clean, BI-ready.
best_for: metrics, KPI reporting, dashboards, total volume by day/bank/channel, success rate, fee revenue, monthly business reports, BI tools

name: transfer_ibft_daily_agg
description: Daily pre-aggregated IBFT volume and value by beneficiary bank. Mart layer purpose-built for dashboards and trending charts. Very fast queries.
best_for: dashboard charts, daily trend volume IBFT, executive reporting, time-series visualization, quick aggregate by bank

name: appsflyer_raw
description: Raw AppsFlyer mobile attribution event stream: installs, re-engagements, in-app events, postbacks. Includes all raw attribution fields, device fingerprinting data, and full postback payload.
best_for: deep-dive mobile attribution analysis, fraud detection on raw installs, investigating specific campaign postbacks, accessing fields not yet modeled, building new attribution models, raw device fingerprint analysis

name: fct_appsflyer_events
description: Curated AppsFlyer mobile attribution events. Deduplicated installs, normalized campaign hierarchy, joined with internal user table. ETL hourly.
best_for: marketing KPI, install count, campaign performance, CPI, ROAS, user acquisition metrics, marketing dashboard, attribution report

name: payment_with_wallet_raw
description: Raw e-wallet payment transaction logs. Captures every payment attempt including pending, failed, reversed states. Contains full merchant payload, device context, and raw response from payment processor.
best_for: debugging failed payments, investigating specific transaction lifecycle, full raw payload for reconciliation, fraud investigation with device context, discovering new payment failure patterns

name: fct_payment_wallet
description: Curated wallet payment fact table. One row per completed payment (success or final-fail). Conformed merchant and user dimensions. Clean for analytics.
best_for: GMV metrics, payment success rate dashboard, merchant performance KPI, transaction volume reporting, revenue analytics

name: transactions_raw
description: Master raw transaction log covering all transaction types: transfer, payment, top-up, withdrawal. The most complete source, never deduped, includes all state transitions.
best_for: cross-product deep-dive, full transaction lifecycle, raw ledger audit, discovering anomaly patterns across all transaction types, financial reconciliation investigation

name: fct_transactions
description: Unified curated transaction fact table across all product types. Deduplicated, final status only. Conformed dimension keys for product, channel, user segment.
best_for: total transaction volume across all products, daily active transaction users, cross-product performance dashboard, executive summary KPI, monthly business reporting

name: top_up_raw
description: Raw top-up (wallet reload) event logs from all channels: bank transfer, card, convenience store, agent. Includes full gateway response, retry events, and pending states.
best_for: debugging top-up failures by channel or bank, investigating gateway response codes, full retry history, finding users with repeated failed top-ups, new channel behavior analysis

name: fct_top_up
description: Curated top-up fact table. Successful top-ups only (plus first-final-fail). Conformed channel, bank dimensions. ETL daily.
best_for: top-up volume KPI, channel mix dashboard, daily/monthly reload trend, top-up fee revenue, bank channel performance metric

name: p2p_transfer_raw
description: Raw peer-to-peer wallet transfer event log. Every send-money event between users including pending, success, fail, reversed. Contains device fingerprint and fraud signals.
best_for: fraud investigation on p2p transfers, device and IP pattern analysis, full lifecycle including reversals, social graph analysis between users, discovering money mule patterns

name: fct_p2p_transfer
description: Curated P2P transfer fact table. Final status events only. Conformed sender/receiver user dimensions. Clean for analytics.
best_for: P2P volume KPI, daily send-money trend, active user metrics, P2P revenue dashboard, product manager reporting

name: qr_payments_raw
description: Raw QR code payment event stream. Includes scan events, payment attempts, QR validation steps, terminal information, and full merchant POS payload.
best_for: debugging QR scan-to-payment drop-off, terminal error investigation, POS integration issues, acquirer response code analysis, QR payment fraud investigation

name: fct_qr_payments
description: Curated QR payment fact table. Successful and final-status QR payments with conformed merchant category, location, and user segment dimensions.
best_for: QR payment volume KPI, success rate dashboard, merchant category spending analysis, GMV by city, BI dashboard, QR product performance reporting

name: bill_payment_raw
description: Raw bill payment event logs: utilities, telecom, insurance, loans. Includes full biller API response, retry events, and intermediate states from biller gateway.
best_for: biller integration debugging, investigating specific biller error codes, full response payload analysis, settlement reconciliation with billers, discovering new biller failure patterns

name: fct_bill_payment
description: Curated bill payment fact table. Final status payments with conformed biller, bill type dimensions.
best_for: bill payment volume KPI, biller performance dashboard, utility payment trends, fee revenue from bills, monthly reporting by biller type

name: login_events_raw
description: Raw user login and authentication event stream: OTP sent/verified, biometric auth, session creation, logout, forced logout. Full device fingerprint and location data.
best_for: user behavior deep-dive, security investigation, login anomaly detection, device switching analysis, OTP failure patterns, session analysis for product research, discovering new UX friction points in login flow

name: fct_user_sessions
description: Curated user session fact table. One row per completed session with duration, authentication method, and user segment. ETL hourly.
best_for: DAU/MAU metrics, session duration dashboard, auth method adoption KPI, user engagement reporting, retention analysis

name: kyc_events_raw
description: Raw KYC (Know Your Customer) verification event stream: document upload, OCR result, face matching, liveness check, manual review steps. Full raw OCR payload and vendor response.
best_for: KYC funnel deep-dive, OCR accuracy analysis per vendor, manual review queue investigation, compliance audit trail, discovering drop-off points in onboarding flow

name: fct_kyc_verification
description: Curated KYC verification outcomes. One row per user's final KYC attempt result with pass/fail and tier assigned.
best_for: KYC approval rate KPI, rejection reason dashboard, onboarding funnel metrics, compliance reporting, user tier distribution

name: refund_chargeback_raw
description: Raw refund and chargeback request event stream. Includes every state transition, dispute communication, and raw bank response for chargebacks.
best_for: dispute investigation, chargeback root cause analysis, bank response code deep-dive, refund SLA investigation, discovering patterns in recurring refund requests

name: fct_refund_chargeback
description: Curated refund and chargeback fact table. Final resolution status with conformed reason and product dimensions.
best_for: refund rate KPI, chargeback ratio dashboard, dispute resolution SLA metrics, loss rate reporting, risk team reporting

name: card_transactions_raw
description: Raw virtual/physical card transaction logs from card network (Visa/MC). Includes authorization, clearing, settlement steps and full ISO 8583 message fields.
best_for: card authorization failure debugging, ISO 8583 message inspection, merchant category analysis with raw MCC, card fraud investigation, clearing vs settlement reconciliation

name: fct_card_transactions
description: Curated card transaction fact table. Settled transactions with decoded MCC, conformed merchant and user dimensions.
best_for: card spending KPI, merchant category spending dashboard, card GMV reporting, interchange fee revenue, card product manager report

name: promo_redemption_raw
description: Raw promotional campaign redemption event stream: voucher applications, cashback calculations, eligibility checks, and reward disbursements. Includes full eligibility rule evaluation log.
best_for: cashback eligibility rule debugging, promo abuse investigation, full eligibility evaluation trail, discovering edge cases in promo rules, new campaign performance signals

name: fct_promo_redemption
description: Curated promotional redemption fact table. One row per successful cashback/discount with campaign and user segment dimensions.
best_for: cashback redemption rate KPI, campaign ROI dashboard, promo cost reporting, monthly marketing spend, user segment cashback analysis, promotion performance report

name: dim_merchants
description: Merchant master dimension table. All registered merchants with category, location, status, and tier attributes. Used as join key in all payment fact tables.
best_for: merchant lookup, join with payment fact tables, merchant segmentation, merchant reporting, category analysis

name: fx_rates_daily
description: Daily foreign exchange rates for all supported currencies. Sourced from central bank and payment network rates. Used for multi-currency transaction conversion.
best_for: currency conversion in reports, multi-currency KPI normalization, FX rate lookup, international transaction reporting

name: merchant_settlement_raw
description: Raw merchant settlement batch files and disbursement events. Contains full settlement batch payload, net amount calculations, fee deductions, and bank transfer confirmation.
best_for: settlement reconciliation deep-dive, missing settlement investigation, bank transfer failure analysis, net fee calculation audit, finance team reconciliation

name: fct_merchant_settlement
description: Curated merchant settlement fact table. Daily settled amounts per merchant with fee breakdown.
best_for: merchant settlement KPI, daily payout dashboard, fee revenue reporting, finance team settlement summary, merchant finance reporting

name: fraud_alerts_summary
description: Aggregated fraud alert summary from the fraud detection engine. Daily rule-triggered alerts by type, risk score distributions, and resolution outcomes.
best_for: fraud KPI dashboard, risk monitoring, alert volume trend, false positive rate reporting, risk management executive summary
